entity.name: Laxmi Ray
entity.description: I'm Laxmi, a software developer with a focus on the Shopify ecosystem since 2022. I've developed a keen interest in the open-source community and have recently transitioned from contributing to projects like "python-social-auth" to actively maintaining the "etsy-python-sdk" package, ensuring its quality and performance.

projects.name: Ask Docs
projects.description: AskDocs is a Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) based Document Question Answering system. It allows users to upload a text document, generate semantic embeddings, retrieve relevant context using vector search, and generate grounded answers.

channels.description: Support my projects via GitHub Sponsors program!

plans.name: ⚡ Encouraging
plans.description: It's such a friendly way of acknowledging this project's existence and supporting open source technology! Every little bit helps show your support and drives me to improve the software more! 🙂

plans.name: ☕ Thoughtful: Buys me a couple cups of coffee a month
plans.description:
Money doesn't grow on trees; I realize this. But throwing a little extra really shows you care about the products and the effort and work that continues to go into them!

📣 In return...

1. You get a a sponsor 🎖️ badge on your profile (internet karma at it's finest!)!
2. The satisfaction that you've helped sustain the Open Source community you love and rely on!

plans.name: 💎 Generous
plans.description:
Your support goes a long way in maintaining all of my projects.

📣 In return...

1. You get all of the perks in Thoughtful Tier package.
2. You will receive priority support on any enhancement requests and/or bug-fixes you find.

plans.name: ⭐ Serious
plans.description:
You are clearly are very serious about supporting one or more of the projects I maintain. I can't thank you enough for this level of sponsorship if you provide it!

📣 In return...

1. You get all of the perks in Generous Tier package.
2. I'll place your company logo on major repositories or any repository of your choice.

plans.name: 🌟 Life-Support
plans.description:
🥇 You are a hero

I really appreciate this kind of help/support.

📣 In return...

1. You get all of the perks; I can't offer anymore. 😉
